title:
Financial Service Provider Register
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Financial Service Provider Register
Data relating to FSP licencees, as is already available on FSP Register website.

BTW this relates to the Financial Markets Authority; you don't have this in your list, though somehow you manage to include New Zealand Artificial Limb Service (seriously?)
Automate the input of relevant data on the basis of just FSP licence number
Giving the data programmatically rather than having to type it in.

### Response from Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
Comments Kia ora. Thank you for your request. 
Information relating to the Financial Service Providers Register is available to be requested via the FSPR Bulk Data service (in JSON format only). You can request access directly here: https://www.companiesoffice.govt.nz/data-services/ways-to-get-our-data/request-access-to-bulk-data/ 
We update this data every month, and once you have access you can download it free of charge, anytime.
We will look to add this dataset to the Companies Office resources on data.govt.nz.
- Whats transparency? 11 May 2026 at 21:43 09:43 pm (31 days ago) Of course its not machine-readable that would allow people to actually parse and examine it and we can't have that!
Whats transparency? 11 May 2026 at 21:43 09:43 pm (31 days ago)
